tools.name: deprecated.devicelist
tools.description:
The method devicelist returns the list of devices owned by the user, and their modules.
A device is identified by its _id (which is its mac address) and each device may have one, several or no modules, also identified by an _id.

tools.name: deprecated.getthermstate
tools.description: The method getthermstate returns the last Thermostat measurements, its current weekly schedule, and, if present, its current manual temperature setpoint.

tools.name: deprecated.getuser
tools.description: The method getuser returns information about a user such as prefered language, prefered units, and list of devices.

tools.name: healthyhomecoach.gethomecoachsdata
tools.description: The method gethomecoachsdata Returns data from a user Healthy Home Coach Station (measures and device specific data).

tools.name: partner.partnerdevices
tools.description: The method partnerdevices returns the list of device_id to which your partner application has access to.

tools.name: public.getpublicdata
tools.description: Retrieves publicly shared weather data from Outdoor Modules within a predefined area.

tools.name: station.getmeasure
tools.description: The method getmeasure returns the measurements of a device or a module.

tools.name: station.getstationsdata
tools.description: The method getstationsdata Returns data from a user's Weather Stations (measures and device specific data).

tools.name: thermostat.createnewschedule
tools.description: The method createnewschedule creates a new schedule stored in the backup list.

tools.name: thermostat.getthermostatsdata
tools.description: The method getthermostatsdata returns information about user's thermostats such as their last measurements.

tools.name: thermostat.setthermpoint
tools.description: The method setthermpoint changes the Thermostat manual temperature setpoint.

tools.name: thermostat.switchschedule
tools.description: The method switchschedule switches the Thermostat's schedule to another existing schedule.

tools.name: thermostat.syncschedule
tools.description: The method syncschedule changes the Thermostat weekly schedule.

tools.name: welcome.addwebhook
tools.description: Links a callback url to a user.

tools.name: welcome.dropwebhook
tools.description: Dissociates a webhook from a user.

tools.name: welcome.getcamerapicture
tools.description: Returns the snapshot associated to an event.

tools.name: welcome.geteventsuntil
tools.description: Returns the snapshot associated to an event.

tools.name: welcome.gethomedata
tools.description: Returns information about users homes and cameras.

tools.name: welcome.getlasteventof
tools.description: Returns most recent events.

tools.name: welcome.getnextevents
tools.description: Returns previous events.

tools.name: welcome.setpersonsaway
tools.description: Sets a person as 'Away' or the Home as 'Empty'. The event will be added to the user’s timeline.

tools.name: welcome.setpersonshome
tools.description: Sets a person as 'At home'.

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
